summary: The pressings version-parser must not decode a Discogs version's major_formats into an object; the API returns it as an array of strings.
reason: The /masters/{id}/versions payload sends major_formats as a JSON array (e.g. ["Vinyl"]). Decoding it into a struct makes json.Unmarshal fail on every version, and the parse loop silently skips failures via continue, so a real master returned scanned:0 with an empty ranked list and no error. The version format string is available from the separate top-level format field.
validated_outcome: pressings 96559 --agent --max 5 returns 5 ranked pressings with live prices (was scanned:0, empty).
